old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-0uv0","title":"[spec-compliance] LLSec byte mismatch in C tx vs spec example and Rust","description":"C lichen_link_tx.c:100 computes llsec=(addr_mode \u0026 0x03U) | (1U \u003c\u003c 2) | 0x20U producing 0x25/0x26 while spec/09-packets-timing.md:48 example uses 0x21 and Rust link_layer.rs:486 + frame.rs produces 0x21/0x22. Breaks interop. Also C schnorr48.c:159-161,201-204 zero/low-order checks not strictly constant-time vs MUST in spec §5.3. From review of commits 7e57bdfbb,91b456fad touching lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c and link_layer.rs.
